ops.title: retrain cutover rollout: reinstall launchd agents BEFORE Sunday 2026-07-19 04:00
ops.description:
The production training loop moved from cc-steer-lab into the cc-steer package (`cc_steer/retrain/`, `cc-steer retrain --component gate|watcher`, Tinker-backed watcher lane). Once `harness/retrain.py` is deleted from the lab (Phase 5; lab pre-deletion snapshot: cc-steer-lab git commit ad14259), the existing `com.cc-steer.retrain` plist still points at the deleted lab module and will fail Sunday 04:00.

Rollout order (Phase 6 of the approved plan):
1. Soak: manual foreground `cc-steer retrain --component gate` then `--component watcher` on a local editable install (real Tinker spend ~$8-15, user-gated).
2. Migrate frozen evals: lab `dataset/frozen/gate_eval.parquet` + `dataset/frozen_v2/watcher_eval.parquet` → `~/.cc-steer/eval/`; seed v001 probs via `cc-steer retrain --component watcher --seed-incumbent-probs <lab>/results/E11/probs/v001.json`.
3. Reinstall agents (`cc-steer pipeline install-launchd`) — the retrain prefix must resolve the `retrain` extra (auto-rewritten to `uvx --from 'cc-steer[retrain]' cc-steer` for the default prefix). Smoke the EXACT plist command before trusting the schedule.
4. Tag the PyPI release after the soak.

⚠️ Serving behavior change at reinstall: the watch agent's plist previously hardcoded `--gate-threshold 0.5`, overriding the promoted gate's trained threshold (v001: 0.9935). The new agents honor the promoted metadata threshold — surface this to the user at the gate.

Also: reconcile cc-notes task 41f08fd (P5 watcher improve-loop) — this consolidation delivers its train_watcher/weekly-launchd/auto-promote scope in the package instead of the lab.

ops.text: com.cc-steer.retrain plist runs the package CLI (no lab reference) and its exact command was smoke-tested
manual gate+watcher soak runs completed with verdict lines in retrain.log and journal entries in ~/.cc-steer/retrain/journal.jsonl
frozen evals + v001 incumbent probs present under ~/.cc-steer/eval/ with digest verification passing
user acknowledged the gate-threshold serving change (hardcoded 0.5 dropped in favor of promoted metadata threshold)
cc-notes task 41f08fd reconciled against the delivered package retrain loop
